dict.string: HyperPointer uses AppleScript to automate apps on your Mac when you ask it to perform tasks.
HyperPointer can read and create calendar events when you ask it to manage your schedule.
HyperPointer can look up contacts when you ask it to help with people-related tasks.
HyperPointer may access your Desktop folder to help with file management tasks.
HyperPointer may access your Documents folder to help with file management tasks.
HyperPointer may access your Downloads folder to help with file management tasks.
HyperPointer uses your microphone for Shift-to-dictate voice input.
HyperPointer can read and create reminders when you ask it to manage your tasks.
HyperPointer converts your speech to text so you can dictate prompts hands-free.
